title: Fillable Washing up Brush and Sponge - Easy Grip Dish Cleaner - with 3X General Purpose Brush Refills and 3X Non-Scratch Refills
features: Washing up brush: An easy to use, fillable hand-held cleaner. Makes cleaning dishes much easier and leaves your dishes sparkling clean.

Brush is refillable with washing up liquid. Simply turn open handle bottom cap, fill with washing up liquid and enjoy a comfortable washing up as liquid dispenses effortlessly through sponge. Simply unclip and replace sponge head with refill once worn.
Brush handle is ergonomically designed for easy grip. With handle, prevent your hands from hot soapy waters.
Brush refill fits perfectly into all Brush handles. Non-scatch sponge refill is ideal for glassware and delicate surfaces.
Pack contains 1X brush and 3X general brush refills and 3X non-scratch brush refills.
